## Theme submission

**Theme name:**
**Widget type:** (chat-box / death-counter / player / …)
**Slug:** `<your-handle>/<theme-slug>`

### Checklist

- [ ] I wrote this theme myself. No AI tools generated any part of it (visuals, CSS, or copy).
- [ ] All assets are bundled in my theme directory; no external URLs in CSS.
- [ ] No JavaScript files or `<script>` tags are included.
- [ ] `preview.png` is included, under 512 KB, and accurately represents the theme.
- [ ] My `fields` keys are real keys for this widget type and values are in range.
- [ ] Any CSS targets only the documented selectors in `docs/css-selectors.md`.
- [ ] I understand accepted themes are free to all toolset users.
- [ ] I have read and agree to the terms in `CONTRIBUTING.md` and `LICENSE`.

### Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything that helps the review: design intent, what makes it original, etc. -->
